title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is OFF
scenario: Verify that the Share Data toggle remains persistently OFF after restarting the app when the user had previously set it to OFF.
steps: 1) Start app for first time, go through onboarding, tap Continue as Guest.
2) On iOS, select any option on location permission screen (not part of this test).
3) Go to App Settings > General > Account and confirm Share Data toggle is OFF with the expected description text.
4) Restart the app, go to App Settings > General > Account and verify the Share Data toggle is still in OFF state.
expected: The Share Data toggle remains persistently OFF after restarting the app when the user had previously set it to OFF.
